rationale: Acting on Review 2 removes the redundant @[simp] includeRight_apply (exact rfl over Mathlib's includeRight + its apply lemma), map_tmul/map_to*Hom (unfoldings of Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_* with id), and antipode_tmul, plus reuses the private general helpers; this yields a smaller, non-duplicative PR. Review 1's approval leaves those needless local lemmas, so the resulting PR is inferior on reuse.
